textByHash.d9ad8b87db311840a055ba12ff3d288b1381321f: Do you know anything about grapevine diseases?
textByHash.4ec5cb587502ba92659112fd7a197c55a5bf0440: You see those grapevines over there?
textByHash.90e70c828263f1eda559b2c7127831bfae95cec1: They've come down with some strange disease that I've never encountered before. I've tried everything with them, but nothing seems to work. If it carries on like this I will lose all this year's crops.
textByHash.6596e3a0b137e578d88bb7381f6151f045796acd: Anything, you just need to ask!
textByHash.9fc7289c96beb40869bfd6b2026f60a8b69fa7cf: I'm afraid I can't do that.
textByHash.8024199defda274995be0f1689473ef9252b4a56: I'm afraid that is the one thing I cannot give you. Burthorpe Vine has been bred over many years and many past generations of my family. I could never give away something so special.
textByHash.4c9762c0da244d0a4f2ae23057d78b51d8ca3677: Hmm, you may be right. If I lose these crops what use are more seeds to me, when I have gone out of business? Very well then, this is the deal - cure my vines and I will give you some Burthorpe Vine seeds.
textByHash.2861cf24843bf8d706d1c3296b85a5ea845562a1: I wouldn't call my livelihood 'nothing' if I were you. Very well, I shall find someone else to assist me.
textByHash.0dc346ed05498e2a42832c71dd0c2ad1267d9d25: Plant cure not doing the trick, eh?
textByHash.ee432f77f5f99ab26aa0a6de44ae72b53a005823: That grapevine disease must be much stronger than the usual. You'll need something a bit more potent to cut out that infection.
textByHash.570a05aacdc2b4f999dabda6061a466af36472c4: No, I don't - but I know of a man who might. Not far from here there's a druid gardener who goes by the name of Alain. He's an expert on things like this, so they tell me.
textByHash.5ab3338e6ee7ebd64db948e9b68f98e772afd456: These vines are very precious indeed. I could not hazard the risk that someone would steal my grapes while I was away - they may be diseased, but they still contain Burthorpe Vine seeds.
textByHash.da249329168ed238430ac8551ec012a2e491f44e: Have you spoken to Alain yet?
textByHash.005193fb17fb52e36ffaa3d1b75f8e517e311089: Let's hope that it does the job, then.
textByHash.7e36ed11e41cff135e25dfe47496438b1ebdb80a: My vines are cured! You have worked a wonder here! Here, you can have those seeds like I promised.
textByHash.d2679f77a3d0d59366e3533a86c9a2adb4d804a2: I would give you some, but you don't appear to have room to carry them.
textByHash.279f54201972c5aeb134fe71184a737875443a9a: Yes, here you go - I hope they grow for you.
textByHash.eb901ccf972920b167dca247beaa4507f948e2f7: What did you do with the ones I gave you?
textByHash.e015e4f079b88a700c0de5b2c19c9d55a8171acd: Oh that's a shame. I hope I find someone soon, otherwise I could lose all this year's crops.
